case_title: MALLEN, PHILIPPE/SMP AUDIO POST VS MICHALSEN, STEVE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MALLEN, PHILIPPE/SMP AUDIO POST AS TO DEFENDANT MICHALSEN, STEVE STEVE MICHALSEN PRODUCTIONS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TOSTEVEN MICHALSEN C/O SMP RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALLEN, PHILIPPE/SMP AUDIO POST IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STEVE MICHALSEN PRODUCTIONS, INC. PLAINTIFF DISMISSED STEVE MICHALSEN PERSONALLY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
